scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const candidates=['node_modules/react-pdf/node_modules/pdfjs-dist/build/pdf.worker.min.mjs','node_modules/pdfjs-dist/build/pdf.worker.min.mjs']; const from=candidates.find((p)=>fs.existsSync(p)); if(!from){console.warn('pdf.worker.min.mjs not found; run npm install'); process.exit(0);} fs.copyFileSync(from, path.join('public','pdf.worker.min.mjs'));"
